Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic.MockRestClient.Builder

Packages that use MockRestClient.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.

  • Uses of MockRestClient.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
